title: Nika Turns the Battle
description: On pages 11–12, this part focuses on Sanji, Kizaru, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Vegapunk as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's it gonna take to keep you down?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world happened?! Are you all right?!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: We cannot allow vegapunk to speak freely.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope vegapunk and the others are alright...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I shall perform the sum- morning.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just like when that Spider Geezer appeared!!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
